data.content: Moved SettingsVerificationSection from standalone section in settings-sheet.tsx into the Simple (actions) tab of SettingsDispatchSection. The verification settings now only appear when dispatch mode is 'actions' (Simple), not when using 'pools' (Advanced). Changes: settings-dispatch-section.tsx (added verification props and renders SettingsVerificationSection in actions tab), settings-sheet.tsx (removed standalone verification section and separator, passes verification props to SettingsDispatchSection). All tests pass (1709/1709). Commit: db88635
